title: Identify integers, rational numbers, positives, negatives, and zero
summary: Draft Unit 2 classification skill extracted from observed source problems about positive and negative integers, zero, and rational numbers.

title: Compare and order integers and rational numbers on the number line
summary: Draft Unit 2 comparison skill extracted from midpoint, interval, and ordering tasks on signed numbers and fractions.

title: Use absolute value to reason about distance and size
summary: Draft Unit 2 absolute-value skill extracted from distance and size comparison tasks.

title: Add and subtract integers and rational numbers
summary: Draft Unit 2 signed addition and subtraction skill extracted from symbolic and contextual change problems.

title: Multiply, divide, and simplify expressions with integers and rational numbers
summary: Draft Unit 2 multiplicative expression skill extracted from multiplication, division, reciprocal, and power problems.
